Episodes.Title: Planet of Giants
Episodes.Writer: Louis Marks, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: When the TARDIS malfunctions and the doors open in the time vortex, the travelers and their Ship shrink to the size of insects. When they arrive on Earth, they uncover a murderous plot involving a new insecticide - but how can the...

Episodes.Title: Dangerous Journey
Episodes.Writer: Louis Marks, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Ian and Barbara are accidentally taken into Smithers' laboratory and, while the Doctor and Susan face a hazardous journey to reach them, they witness the deadly effects of DN6 first hand.

Episodes.Title: Crisis
Episodes.Writer: Louis Marks, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends face a race against time to expose Forrester's plans and return to normal size before Barbara succumbs to the effects of DN6.

Episodes.Title: World's End
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Ian and Barbara believe the TARDIS has finally returned to their contemporary London, but soon discover signs of plague and warfare. Their old enemies, the Daleks, have invaded the Earth of the 22nd century. Separated and fighting...

Episodes.Title: The Daleks
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Ian are taken to the Dalek saucer while Susan and Barbara join the rebels in planning an attack.

Episodes.Title: Day of Reckoning
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor manages to escape from the Dalek saucer and meet up with Susan and David but Ian is left trapped onboard. Meanwhile, Barbara and her new friends face a dangerous journey across London.

Episodes.Title: The End of Tomorrow
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: While Susan and David try to find a way out of London, Ian and Larry infiltrate the Dalek mine workings.

Episodes.Title: The Waking Ally
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor's party investigate the Daleks' central control in Bedfordshire while Barbara and Jenny's attempt to reach it are derailed when they are betrayed.

Episodes.Title: Flashpoint
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Daleks' plan to transform Earth into a giant spaceship and wipe out its inhabitants is nearing completion and the Doctor and his friends face a race against time to prevent them from destroying the planet's core.

Episodes.Title: The Powerful Enemy
Episodes.Writer: David Whitaker, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: On the planet Dido, the monstrous Koquillion terrorizes Bennett and Vicki, the only survivors of a crashed spaceship. When the TARDIS lands, the Doctor, Ian, and Barbara team up with Vicki to discover what Koquillion is hiding. (O...

Episodes.Title: Desperate Measures
Episodes.Writer: David Whitaker, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Ian reach the crashed spaceship and meet up with Barbara and Vicki, where the Doctor uncovers the truth about Koquillion.

Episodes.Title: The Slave Traders
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The travelers decide to take a holiday near ancient Rome, but after a month the Doctor gets restless. He and Vicki determine to visit Rome, and while they are gone Ian and Barbara are abducted by slave traders. All roads lead to R...

Episodes.Title: All Roads Lead to Rome
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: While the Doctor and Vicki meet with Nero, Barbara is taken to Rome to be sold while Ian is forced to work as a galley slave.

Episodes.Title: Conspiracy
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Ian and Delos are forced to fight each other for their freedom while the Doctor has to perform for Nero's court.

Episodes.Title: Inferno
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Ian and Delos manage to escape from Sevcheria and Tavius agrees to help Barbara rejoin them.The Doctor's attempts to avoid being thrown to the lions inadvertently result in Nero deciding to burn down Rome.

Episodes.Title: The Web Planet
Episodes.Writer: Bill Strutton, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS is drawn by a mysterious force and lands on the alien planet Vortis. There the Doctor, Ian, Barbara and Vicki find themselves caught up in a war between an evil force known as "The Animus", its ant-like Zarbi allies, an...

Episodes.Title: The Zarbi
Episodes.Writer: Bill Strutton, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Ian and Vicki are captured by the Zarbi while Barbara meets up with the butterfly-like Menoptera who are trying to reclaim the planet.

Episodes.Title: Escape to Danger
Episodes.Writer: Bill Strutton, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Maureen O'Brien
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor is forced to co-operate with the Animus but Ian uses the opportunity to make an escape attempt.

Episodes.Title: Crater of Needles
Episodes.Writer: Bill Strutton, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Ian and Vrestin are captured by the subterranean Optera while Barbara and her Menoptera allies attempt to escape from the slave camp.

Episodes.Title: Invasion
Episodes.Writer: Bill Strutton, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Barbara and the surviving Menoptera take refuge in the Temple of Light while the Doctor and Vicki attempt to escape by taking control of a Zarbi.

Episodes.Title: The Centre
Episodes.Writer: Bill Strutton, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Vicki are taken before the Animus but the isoptope is left behind in the laboratory.The only hope of victory lies with Barbara and her Menoptera allies.

Episodes.Title: The Lion
Episodes.Writer: David Whitaker, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS lands in the Holy Land during the Third Crusade and the crew help save Richard the Lionheart from an ambush, but Barbara is captured and brought before Saladin.

Episodes.Title: The Knight of Jaffa
Episodes.Writer: David Whitaker, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: While the Doctor, Ian, and Vicki are drawn into the intrigues of King Richard's court, Barbara has to cope with an impatient Saladin and the vengeful El Akir.

Episodes.Title: The Wheel of Fortune
Episodes.Writer: David Whitaker, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Barbara allies herself with a man whose were murdered by El Akir as the Doctor and Vicki are caught up in Richard's plan to offer his sister's hand in marriage to Saladin's brother.

Episodes.Title: The Warlords
Episodes.Writer: David Whitaker, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Ian sets out with a reluctant accomplice to rescue Barbara from El Akir's palace as the Doctor and Vicki try to evade the suspicions of the Earl of Leicester.

Episodes.Title: The Space Museum
Episodes.Writer: Glyn Jones, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS arrives on a planet that has been turned into a space museum but the Doctor and his friends are puzzled when they find themselves out of phase with their surroundings.

Episodes.Title: The Dimensions of Time
Episodes.Writer: Glyn Jones, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: Now back on their proper time track, the Doctor and his friends must work to avoid the future they saw for themselves.

Episodes.Title: The Search
Episodes.Writer: Glyn Jones, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: With the Doctor missing, Ian, Barbara and Vicki find themselves in danger from the Moroks while the Xerons also try to make contact with them.

Episodes.Title: The Final Phase
Episodes.Writer: Glyn Jones, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: While Ian tries to force Lobos to release the Doctor from the museum, Vicki joins the Xerons in trying to gain the weapons needed to start a revolution against the occupiers.

Episodes.Title: The Executioners
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor has obtained a Time and Space Visualizer, which has a TV screen that can show scenes in the past to order. Lincoln, Shakespeare and the Beatles are selected. They land on a barren planet with two suns, and become separa...

Episodes.Title: The Death of Time
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: While Ian and Vicki are threatened by a Mire Beast, the Doctor and Barbara meet up with the Aridians...who are then ordered to hand them over to the Daleks.

Episodes.Title: Flight Through Eternity
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS crew's attempts to escape from the Daleks take them to the top of the Empire State Building and a 19th century sailing ship.

Episodes.Title: Journey Into Terror
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS lands in a haunted house where the Doctor and his friends are confronted by Dracula and Frankenstein's Monster...and then the Daleks appear.

Episodes.Title: The Death of Doctor Who
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: With Vicki trapped on board the Dalek time machine, the Doctor, Ian and Barbara decide to make their stand on the planet Mechanus.

Episodes.Title: The Planet of Decision
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Russell, Jacqueline Hill
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends are taken into the Mechanoid City but their troubles are far from over...especially when the Daleks launch an attack.

Episodes.Title: The Watcher
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Maureen O'Brien, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Vicki, and Steven Taylor, go to 1066 England, but something doesn't seem right including modern inventions like a Gramaphone and electricity. Could there be another time traveller?

Episodes.Title: The Meddling Monk
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Maureen O'Brien, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor is being held prisoner by the Monk and Steven and Vicki's search for him brings them to the Saxon village.But a greater danger threatens when a Viking raiding party arrives.

Episodes.Title: A Battle of Wits
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Maureen O'Brien, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor manages to escape from his cell and get the upper hand on the Monk but his plans are derailed when Sven and Ulf arrive at the monastery.

Episodes.Title: Checkmate
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Maureen O'Brien, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor finally discovers what the Monk is up to and must move fast to prevent his opponent from altering the course of history.
